prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约6711名→8298名→1809名→946名→741名，自2023年起位次大幅前移，近3年累计前移约6000名，2025年基准约741名，呈持续上升趋势；该校在湖南省物理类招生计划2021年85人→2022年65人→2023年41人→2024年45人→2025年31人→2026年25人，2026年较2025年缩招约19.4%，缩招幅度较大，竞争进一步加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第12名（Top20），近年排名稳定在前16名以内，属于国内顶尖工科强校；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度总排名第10（高热），短视频曝光量大，报考关注度持续较高；2024年曾出现中关注度投档线异常信号，但2025年位次继续前移，影响已消化；拥有17个A-及以上学科，其中力学、机械工程、材料科学与工程、环境科学与工程为A+，计算机科学与技术、控制科学与工程、土木工程等为A，工科实力极为突出，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 湖南省2026年物理类考生约34.7万人，较2025年32.0万人增加约8.4%，考生规模扩大加剧竞争；省控线物理类本科批2021年434→2022年414→2023年415→2024年422→2025年405，呈波动下降趋势；哈尔滨工业大学位于黑龙江，属跨省远距离招生，但作为C9联盟高校，地域因素对顶尖考生报考意愿影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026年大幅缩招（-19.4%）及本省物理类考生增加（+8.4%）等多重因素，缩招使竞争加剧（位次数字减小），但考生规模扩大部分抵消该效应；结合抖音高热曝光和顶尖工科实力对考生的持续吸引力，预计2026年最低位次在2025年基准741名基础上进一步前移，预测最低位次约670名，区间594–746名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次670名处于该校近年录取高位区间，建议位次在594–746名内的考生以二档专业为主力填报、一档王牌专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<594名）可重点冲击一档院士特色班/未来技术拔尖班等顶尖培养项目；位次接近区间上限（>746名）建议以三档专业为主、二档为辅，并关注其他同层次高校的备选方案。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 6711 → 8298 → 1809 → 946 → 741. Since 2023, rankings have significantly moved forward, with a cumulative advance of about 6000 positions in the last 3 years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 741, showing a continuous upward trend. The enrollment plan for this university in Hunan Province for Physics Category was 85 in 2021 → 65 in 2022 → 41 in 2023 → 45 in 2024 → 31 in 2025 → 25 in 2026. In 2026, compared to 2025, enrollment is reduced by about 19.4%, a significant reduction, further intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class university; ranked 12th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (Top 20), with stable rankings within the top 16 in recent years, belonging to the top domestic engineering strong schools. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. Douyin heat total ranking 10th (high heat), with large short video exposure, maintaining high application attention. In 2024, there was a medium attention abnormal signal in the admission cutoff line, but the ranking continued to advance in 2025, indicating the impact has been absorbed. It has 17 A- or above disciplines, including Mechanics, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, and Environmental Science and Engineering as A+, and Computer Science and Technology, Control Science and Engineering, Civil Engineering, etc. as A. Its engineering strength is extremely outstanding, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Hunan Province is about 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% from 320,000 in 2025, with the expansion of candidate scale intensifying competition. The provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch was 434 in 2021 → 414 in 2022 → 415 in 2023 → 422 in 2024 → 405 in 2025, showing a fluctuating downward trend. Harbin Institute of Technology is located in Heilongjiang, a long-distance cross-province enrollment, but as a C9 League university, the regional factor has limited impact on top candidates' willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the continuous forward trend of historical rankings, the significant enrollment reduction in 2026 (-19.4%), and the increase in local Physics Category candidates (+8.4%), the enrollment reduction intensifies competition (ranking number decreases), but the expansion of candidate scale partially offsets this effect. Combined with high Douyin heat exposure and the sustained attraction of top engineering strength to candidates, it is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will further advance from the 2025 baseline of 741, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 670, and a range of 594–746.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking of 670 is in the high admission range of this university in recent years. It is recommended that candidates with rankings within 594–746 mainly apply for Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<594) can focus on impacting Tier 1 Academician Special Class/Future Technology Top Talent Class and other top training programs. Candidates with rankings close to the upper limit (>746) should mainly apply for Tier 3 majors, supplemented by Tier 2, and consider alternative options at other universities of the same level.
